text:
The Hunter Website Bartender is an interactive conduit for giving information on the Hunters' Tavern. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Appearance

The bartender has a medium build, a crooked nose, square jaw, and sideburns. His dark hair is combed back. He is dressed in a bartender attire typical of Western films.

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Acting as the "contact man" for information on the Hunters' Tavern, the bartender is consulted by Gon and Killua when they want to learn more about the Greed Island game. He provides the requested information after they pay 20 million. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations, although it is unlikely that he has one.
He shares the same voice actor as Leorio Paradinight in the English dub of the 2011 anime adaptation.
